raw_consumer_statement: Dear whomever it may concern, I am writing this message today because I don't believe I am getting the right treatment with Home Depot Credit Services. On XX/XX/XXXX, another account was opened under my name and was charged {$2300.00}. I reached out the 1st time to get it solved but was then given a letter stating that I was the one responsible for the charges. I have contacted the number provided on the bill ( XXXX ) and appealed and was told it would take 30-60 days to reinvest the case. About 2 weeks later, I received a letter denied my appealed. I have also filed a police report on XX/XX/XXXX and was told that the police were going to investigate the situation as well.
